TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Leyoxen = Tnhangan alang Alang Ri-yo-hen. Thuyang alang Kingal seejiq Ma-pa-ara-ya-cyun ka Ri-yo-hen-se, gaga nniq truma alang Aw-hwa(kika he-pin-si cwo-an). Nniqan alang I-ran-syeyn Nan-aw-syang Cin-yuey-cun, Aw-Hwa cun, Han-si-cun. Klbangan Kndkilan lnglingay Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc syusan teyn-c Nniqan seejiq alang Seejiq Atayal. Skari kari Atayal, Tlu. Snhiyaan Pnyahan alang Brah han o nniq babaw yayung Syaw-wa ka Ri-yo-hen, knhdyaqan dha Syang-kung-swo ga wada saw niqan 34km ka nniqa dha alang dgiyaq, dhiyaq bi ka alang ni
S.PHON: = l…ôox…ôn = tnńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč …ĺi-jo-ńß…ôn. tńßujaŇč alaŇč kiŇčal s…ô…ô…üiq ma-pa-a…ĺa-ja- ¶jun ka …ĺi-jo-ńß…ôn-s…ô, gaga nniq t…ĺuma alaŇč aw-ńßwa(kika ńß…ô-pin-si ¶wo-an). nniqan alaŇč i-…ĺan-sj…ôn nan-aw-sjaŇč ¶in-ju…ô- ¶un, aw-ńßwa ¶un, ńßan-si- ¶un. klbaŇčan kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj kklaan ppanan mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn- ¶ nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq atajal. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi atajal, tlu. snńßijaan pnjańßan alaŇč b…ĺańß ńßan o nniq babaw jajuŇč sjaw-wa ka …ĺi-jo-ńß…ôn, knńßdjaqan dńßa sjaŇč-kuŇč-swo ga wada saw niqan **km ka nniqa dńßa alaŇč dgijaq, dńßijaq bi ka alaŇč ni
S.FORM: = Leyoxen = Tnhangan alang Alang Ri-yo-hen. Thuyang alang Kingal seejiq Ma-pa-ara-ya-cyun ka Ri-yo-hen-se, gaga nniq truma alang Aw-hwa(kika he-pin-si cwo-an). Nniqan alang I-ran-syeyn Nan-aw-syang Cin-yuey-cun, Aw-Hwa cun, Han-si-cun. Klbangan Kndkilan lnglingay Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc syusan teyn-c Nniqan seejiq alang Seejiq Atayal. Skari kari Atayal, Tlu. Snhiyaan Pnyahan alang Brah han o nniq babaw yayung Syaw-wa ka Ri-yo-hen, knhdyaqan dha Syang-kung-swo ga wada saw niqan 34km ka nniqa dha alang dgiyaq, dhiyaq bi ka alang ni
S.PHON: = l…ôox…ôn = tnńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč …ĺi-jo-ńß…ôn. tńßujaŇč alaŇč kiŇčal s…ô…ô…üiq ma-pa-a…ĺa-ja- ¶jun ka …ĺi-jo-ńß…ôn-s…ô, gaga nniq t…ĺuma alaŇč aw-ńßwa(kika ńß…ô-pin-si ¶wo-an). nniqan alaŇč i-…ĺan-sj…ôn nan-aw-sjaŇč ¶in-ju…ô- ¶un, aw-ńßwa ¶un, ńßan-si- ¶un. klbaŇčan kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj kklaan ppanan mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn- ¶ nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq atajal. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi atajal, tlu. snńßijaan pnjańßan alaŇč b…ĺańß ńßan o nniq babaw jajuŇč sjaw-wa ka …ĺi-jo-ńß…ôn, knńßdjaqan dńßa sjaŇč-kuŇč-swo ga wada saw niqan **km ka nniqa dńßa alaŇč dgijaq, dńßijaq bi ka alaŇč ni
